name: Swing Sports Zone
about: Swing Sports Zone is a multi-sport facility featuring both baseball/softball batting cages and golf simulators. The venue provides a dynamic space for visitors to hone their skills in both sports, with batting cages for baseball and softball practice and cutting-edge golf simulators that transport players to world-class courses. The facility operates on a mixed pricing model, offering hourly bay rentals and various membership options for batting cage access, with online booking available for all activities. It is designed to cater to a diverse clientele including individual athletes, families, and groups looking for sports entertainment and training.
why_golfers_like_it: Ability to practice on world-class virtual courses
Convenient indoor facility for year-round play
Mixed-sport venue offering variety for athletes
Available for private events and group bookings

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site
No mention of alcohol service available on-site

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own golf clubs for the simulator experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of outside food or drink policies on the website, so it's best to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the time required for a full 18-hole round on the simulator, but typical simulator rounds usually take 1-2 hours depending on the number of players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Swing Sports Zone appears to be kid-friendly as it offers both batting cages and golf simulators, making it suitable for families and youth activities.
